title: GitHub - Observal/Observal: Observal is a local registry and analytics platform for your AI components.  Setup Observal, define the scope and share your Skills, MCPs and Agents.
excerpt: Observal is a local registry and analytics platform for your AI components. Setup Observal, define the scope and share your Skills, MCPs and Agents. - Observal/Observal

Observal is the control plane and system of record for internal AI components

If you find Observal useful, please consider giving it a star. It helps others discover the project and keeps development going.

What is Observal and what does it solve?

Observal is the control plane and system of record for internal AI components. Every tech-forward organization today creates internal Skills, Agents, MCP servers and other AI components to boost productivity. Though the creation of these components has been prolific, the adoption and usage of such components is sparse. Developer/AI users today end up creating their own version of AI components without reusing existing packages.

The cause is largely due to two problems:

  1. Lack of a discoverability layer

    Organizations store their AI components and agents in siloed github repositories with little to no documentation. Users are not able to locate similar components and this results in multiple developers creating the same/similar components again.

  2. Missing feedback loop

    Any software where usage patterns are not understood and the principle of user-centric development is violated tends to fade out. Such is the problem with development of MCPs, Skills and Agents. Developers publish and maintain these components with little visibility into how they're actually used. Additionally, AI failures don't trigger static error codes: they hallucinate or provide subtly incorrect answers. This leaves users clueless about what went wrong compounding the feedback problem.

Observal solves this by providing a centralized discovery layer for AI components alongside useful insights into AI usage patterns. It turns silent failures into actionable feedback, ensuring internal AI tools are continuously optimized for the people using them.

Observal supports Claude Code, Cursor, Kiro, Pi, Copilot, Codex, OpenCode, and other tools.

Why teams use Observal

  • Package components into reusable agents: Bundle Skills, MCP servers, hooks, prompts, and sandboxes into one versioned unit.
  • Run a governed registry: Review submissions, approve internal agents, inspect version diffs, and give developers one trusted place to install from.
  • Render across multiple Coding IDE/CLI: Generate the correct config for each supported harness instead of maintaining separate setup instructions for every harness.
  • Learn what works: Use real adoption and session data to find which agents, tools, prompts, and workflows are helping teams.
  • Replay sessions when needed: Use traces as evidence for debugging, review, audits, and deeper analysis.

Supported harnesses

harness
Claude Code
Kiro
Cursor
Pi
Copilot (CLI & VS Code Extension)
Codex
OpenCode
Antigravity CLI

One command to install any agent into any supported harness. The config files are generated per-harness automatically.

Quick Start

Observal has two parts: a server (API + web UI + databases) you self-host, and a CLI you install on each developer machine.

1. Deploy the server

One-line install (requires Docker Engine ≥ 24.0 with Compose v2):

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Observal/Observal/main/install-server.sh | bash

This downloads a Docker Compose package, runs guided setup (domain, secrets, ports), pulls container images from GHCR, and starts the full stack (API, web UI, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Redis, worker, load balancer, Prometheus, Grafana).

Deployment docs are linked directly from this README:

  • Setup guide: fastest path from zero to a working stack
  • Self-hosting overview: deployment models and operator docs
  • Production deployment: hardened production topology
  • Databases: Postgres, ClickHouse, migrations, retention
  • Upgrades: safe upgrade and rollback flow
  • Backup and restore: backup plan before upgrades

From source (for contributors):

git clone https://github.com/Observal/Observal.git && cd Observal
cp .env.example .env
make up

2. Install the CLI

Standalone binary (no Python required):

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Observal/Observal/main/install.sh | bash

Python (3.11+):

uv tool install observal-cli
# or: pipx install observal-cli

3. Connect your harness

observal auth login
observal doctor --patch

This authenticates with your server, detects your harness, installs telemetry hooks, starts capturing sessions automatically, and prepares it for agent installs and registry commands.

Once logged in, run /observal inside your harness and it takes the wheel. Pull agents, submit components, browse the registry, run diagnostics:

/observal pull security-auditor
/observal scan
/observal doctor

Or just tell your agent what you want and it figures out the right commands.

How Observal works

Agents are portable context packages

An agent bundles 5 component types into a single installable package: MCP servers, skills, hooks, prompts, and sandboxes. You define the agent once, publish it to the registry, and Observal generates the right config files for whichever supported harness or harness the user runs.

observal pull security-auditor --harness pi

The registry is the distribution layer

Browse published agents, see which harnesses they support, check download counts and ratings, and install with one command. Admins review submissions before they go live. Version diffs show exactly what changed between releases, so teams can safely evolve shared context.

Insights show what is helping

Observal turns real usage into reports about which agents, prompts, tools, and workflows are working or getting in the way. Use those insights to improve shared context instead of guessing from anecdotes.

Session traces provide the evidence

When you need to debug, audit, or understand a result, Observal can replay the full coding session: user prompts, thinking blocks, assistant responses, and tool calls with their inputs and outputs. The traces support registry and insight workflows rather than defining the product.

Agent Registry

Browse, search, and install agents with harness compatibility badges:

Build agents visually with live config preview for every harness:

Components library: MCPs, Skills, Hooks, Prompts, Sandboxes:

Agent Insights

AI-powered insight reports analyze usage patterns across all sessions, what's working, what's hindering, and quick wins. Powered by LiteLLM, works with any provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Bedrock, Gemini, Azure, Ollama).

See Insights LLM Setup for configuration.

Session Replay

Full session overview with token counts, models, tools, and turn-by-turn timeline:

Every turn captured: user prompt, tool calls, thinking block, assistant response:

Drill into any span to see exact tool inputs and outputs:

Review and Governance

Admin review queue with full prompt inspection and approve/reject:

Version diffs show exactly what changed between releases:

Leaderboard tracks top agents and components by downloads:

Open-source features

Audit logs, SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, and the executive dashboard are included in the Apache-2.0 distribution.

Audit log with parameterized search:

Documentation

Full docs at docs.observal.io.

Start here for deployment and operations:

Need Link
Fast local or source setup SETUP.md
Self-hosting overview docs/self-hosting/README.md
Production deployment docs/self-hosting/production-deploy.md
Single-node deployment docs/self-hosting/single-node-deploy.md
Docker Compose setup docs/self-hosting/docker-compose.md
Databases and migrations docs/self-hosting/databases.md
Upgrades docs/self-hosting/upgrades.md
Backup and restore docs/self-hosting/backup-and-restore.md

Tech Stack

Layer Technology
Frontend Vite 6, React 19, TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui
Backend Python 3.11+, FastAPI, Strawberry GraphQL
Databases PostgreSQL 16 (registry), ClickHouse (telemetry)
Queue Redis + arq
CLI Python, Typer, Rich
Telemetry Session hooks, local transcript reconciliation, push-based ingest
Deployment Docker Compose (10 services), Kubernetes (Helm)

Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING.md. The short version:

  1. Fork and clone
  2. make hooks to install pre-commit hooks
  3. Create a feature branch
  4. Run make lint and make test
  5. Open a PR

See AGENTS.md for internal codebase context.

Community

GitHub Discussions for questions and ideas. Discord for chat. Open Issues for confirmed bugs.

Reporting Issues

observal support bundle

Produces a redacted diagnostic archive. Review before sharing: observal support inspect observal-support-*.tar.gz

For live debugging, Observal uses loguru-based dev logging (internally called "optic"). Stream logs with:

observal logs

Logs are written to ~/.observal/logs/dev.log and include structured context for every request, background job, and telemetry event.

Security

Report vulnerabilities via GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting or email contact@observal.io. Do not open a public issue. See SECURITY.md.

Star History

License

Observal is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. See LICENSE.

blocks.html_en: Observal has two parts: a server (API + web UI + databases) you self-host, and a CLI you install on each developer machine.

sentences.en: Observal has two parts: a server (API + web UI + databases) you self-host, and a CLI you install on each developer machine.

blocks.html_en: This downloads a Docker Compose package, runs guided setup (domain, secrets, ports), pulls container images from GHCR, and starts the full stack (API, web UI, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Redis, worker, load balancer, Prometheus, Grafana).

sentences.en: Connect your harness
sentences.zh: 连接您的线束

blocks.html_en: This authenticates with your server, detects your harness, installs telemetry hooks, starts capturing sessions automatically, and prepares it for agent installs and registry commands.

sentences.en: This authenticates with your server, detects your harness, installs telemetry hooks, starts capturing sessions automatically, and prepares it for agent installs and registry commands.
sentences.zh: 这将通过您的服务器进行身份验证，检测您的工具，安装遥测挂钩，自动开始捕获会话，并为代理安装和注册表命令做好准备。

blocks.html_en: Once logged in, run /observal inside your harness and it takes the wheel. Pull agents, submit components, browse the registry, run diagnostics:

sentences.en: Once logged in, run /observal inside your harness and it takes the wheel.
sentences.zh: 登录后，在你的安全带中运行 /observal ，它就会掌控方向盘。

sentences.en: Pull agents, submit components, browse the registry, run diagnostics:
sentences.zh: 拉代理、提交组件、浏览注册表、运行诊断：

blocks.html_en: Or just tell your agent what you want and it figures out the right commands.

sentences.en: Or just tell your agent what you want and it figures out the right commands.
sentences.zh: 或者只是告诉你的代理你想要什么，它会找出正确的命令。

sentences.en: How Observal works
sentences.zh: 观察如何运作

blocks.html_en: Agents are portable context packages

sentences.en: Agents are portable context packages
sentences.zh: 代理是可移植的上下文包

blocks.html_en: An agent bundles 5 component types into a single installable package: MCP servers, skills, hooks, prompts, and sandboxes. You define the agent once, publish it to the registry, and Observal generates the right config files for whichever supported harness or harness the user runs.

sentences.en: An agent bundles 5 component types into a single installable package: MCP servers, skills, hooks, prompts, and sandboxes.
sentences.zh: 代理将 5 种组件类型捆绑到一个可安装包中：MCP 服务器、技能、挂钩、提示和沙箱。

sentences.en: You define the agent once, publish it to the registry, and Observal generates the right config files for whichever supported harness or harness the user runs.
sentences.zh: 您定义代理一次，将其发布到注册表，Observal 会为用户运行的任何受支持的工具生成正确的配置文件。

blocks.html_en: The registry is the distribution layer

sentences.en: The registry is the distribution layer
sentences.zh: 注册中心是分发层

blocks.html_en: Browse published agents, see which harnesses they support, check download counts and ratings, and install with one command. Admins review submissions before they go live. Version diffs show exactly what changed between releases, so teams can safely evolve shared context.

sentences.en: Browse published agents, see which harnesses they support, check download counts and ratings, and install with one command.
sentences.zh: 浏览已发布的代理，查看它们支持哪些工具，检查下载计数和评级，并使用一个命令进行安装。

sentences.en: Admins review submissions before they go live.
sentences.zh: 管理员在提交的内容上线之前对其进行审核。

sentences.en: Version diffs show exactly what changed between releases, so teams can safely evolve shared context.
sentences.zh: 版本差异准确显示了版本之间的变化，因此团队可以安全地发展共享上下文。

blocks.html_en: Insights show what is helping

sentences.en: Insights show what is helping
sentences.zh: 见解显示什么是有帮助的

blocks.html_en: Observal turns real usage into reports about which agents, prompts, tools, and workflows are working or getting in the way. Use those insights to improve shared context instead of guessing from anecdotes.

sentences.en: Observal turns real usage into reports about which agents, prompts, tools, and workflows are working or getting in the way.
sentences.zh: Observal 将实际使用情况转化为有关哪些代理、提示、工具和工作流程正在工作或正在妨碍的报告。

sentences.en: Use those insights to improve shared context instead of guessing from anecdotes.
sentences.zh: 利用这些见解来改善共享背景，而不是根据轶事进行猜测。

blocks.html_en: Session traces provide the evidence

sentences.en: Session traces provide the evidence
sentences.zh: 会话跟踪提供了证据

blocks.html_en: When you need to debug, audit, or understand a result, Observal can replay the full coding session: user prompts, thinking blocks, assistant responses, and tool calls with their inputs and outputs. The traces support registry and insight workflows rather than defining the product.

sentences.en: When you need to debug, audit, or understand a result, Observal can replay the full coding session: user prompts, thinking blocks, assistant responses, and tool calls with their inputs and outputs.
sentences.zh: 当您需要调试、审核或理解结果时，Observal 可以重播完整的编码会话：用户提示、思维块、助理响应以及工具调用及其输入和输出。

sentences.en: The traces support registry and insight workflows rather than defining the product.
sentences.zh: 这些跟踪支持注册和洞察工作流程，而不是定义产品。

╚██████╔╝██████╔╝███████║███████╗██║  ██║ ╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║███████╗
 ╚═════╝ ╚═════╝ ╚══════╝╚══════╝╚═╝  ╚═╝  ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝

Observal 是内部 AI 组件的控制平面和记录系统

如果您觉得 Observal 有用，请考虑给它一颗星。 它可以帮助其他人发现该项目并保持开发的进行。

什么是 Observal？它能解决什么问题？

Observal 是内部人工智能组件的控制平面和记录系统。 如今，每个技术领先的组织都会创建内部技能、代理、MCP 服务器和其他 AI 组件来提高生产力。 尽管这些组件的创建非常丰富，但此类组件的采用和使用却很少。 如今，开发人员/人工智能用户最终会创建自己版本的人工智能组件，而无需重用现有的软件包。

究其原因，很大程度上是因为两个问题：

  1. 缺乏可发现层组织将其人工智能组件和代理存储在孤立的 github 存储库中，几乎没有文档。 用户无法找到相似的组件，这导致多个开发人员再次创建相同/相似的组件。
  2. 缺少反馈循环任何不理解使用模式并且违反以用户为中心的开发原则的软件都容易被淘汰。 这就是 MCP、技能和代理发展的问题。 开发人员发布和维护这些组件，但对它们的实际使用方式知之甚少。 此外，人工智能故障不会触发静态错误代码：它们会产生幻觉或提供微妙的错误答案。 这使得用户对出了什么问题一无所知，从而加剧了反馈问题。

Observal 通过为 AI 组件提供集中的发现层以及对 AI 使用模式的有用见解来解决这个问题。 它将无声的故障转化为可操作的反馈，确保内部人工智能工具针对使用它们的人不断优化。

Observal 支持 Claude Code、Cursor、Kiro、Pi、Copilot、Codex、OpenCode 和其他工具。

团队为何使用 Observal

  • 将组件打包到可重用代理中：将技能、MCP 服务器、挂钩、提示和沙箱捆绑到一个版本化单元中。
  • 运行受管理的注册表：审核提交、批准内部代理、检查版本差异，并为开发人员提供一个值得信赖的安装位置。
  • 跨多个编码 IDE/CLI 进行渲染：为每个支持的线束生成正确的配置，而不是为每个线束维护单独的设置指令。
  • 了解哪些方法有效：使用真实的采用和会话数据来查找哪些代理、工具、提示和工作流程正在为团队提供帮助。
  • 需要时重播会话：使用跟踪作为调试、审查、审核和更深入分析的证据。

支持的线束

马具
克劳德·科德
Kiro
光标
Pi
Copilot（CLI 和 VS 代码扩展）
Codex
开放代码
反重力 CLI

一个命令即可将任何代理安装到任何受支持的线束中。 配置文件是根据线束自动生成的。

快速入门

Observal 有两部分：您自行托管的服务器（API + Web UI + 数据库）和您在每台开发人员计算机上安装的 CLI。

1. 部署服务器

一行安装（需要 Docker Engine ≥ 24.0 和 Compose v2）：

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Observal/Observal/main/install-server.sh | bash

这将下载 Docker Compose 包，运行引导设置（域、秘密、端口），从 GHCR 提取容器映像，并启动完整堆栈（API、Web UI、PostgreSQL、ClickHouse、Redis、worker、负载均衡器、Prometheus、Grafana）。

部署文档直接从此自述文件链接：

  • 设置指南：从零到工作堆栈的最快路径
  • 自托管概述：部署模型和操作员文档
  • 生产部署：强化生产拓扑
  • 数据库：Postgres、ClickHouse、迁移、保留
  • 升级：安全升级和回滚流程
  • 备份与恢复：升级前的备份计划

来自来源（对于贡献者）：

git clone https://github.com/Observal/Observal.git && cd Observal
cp .env.example .env
make up

2. 安装命令行界面

独立二进制文件（不需要 Python）：

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Observal/Observal/main/install.sh | bash

Python（3.11+）：

uv tool install observal-cli
# or: pipx install observal-cli

3. 连接您的线束

observal auth login
observal doctor --patch

这将通过您的服务器进行身份验证，检测您的工具，安装遥测挂钩，自动开始捕获会话，并为代理安装和注册表命令做好准备。

登录后，在你的安全带中运行 /observal ，它就会掌控方向盘。 拉代理、提交组件、浏览注册表、运行诊断：

/observal pull security-auditor
/observal scan
/observal doctor

或者只是告诉你的代理你想要什么，它会找出正确的命令。

观察如何运作

代理是可移植的上下文包

代理将 5 种组件类型捆绑到一个可安装包中：MCP 服务器、技能、挂钩、提示和沙箱。 您定义代理一次，将其发布到注册表，Observal 会为用户运行的任何受支持的工具生成正确的配置文件。

observal pull security-auditor --harness pi

注册中心是分发层

浏览已发布的代理，查看它们支持哪些工具，检查下载计数和评级，并使用一个命令进行安装。 管理员在提交的内容上线之前对其进行审核。 版本差异准确显示了版本之间的变化，因此团队可以安全地发展共享上下文。

见解显示什么是有帮助的

Observal 将实际使用情况转化为有关哪些代理、提示、工具和工作流程正在工作或正在妨碍的报告。 利用这些见解来改善共享背景，而不是根据轶事进行猜测。

会话跟踪提供了证据

当您需要调试、审核或理解结果时，Observal 可以重播完整的编码会话：用户提示、思维块、助理响应以及工具调用及其输入和输出。 这些跟踪支持注册和洞察工作流程，而不是定义产品。

代理见解

由人工智能驱动的洞察报告可分析所有会话的使用模式、有效的内容、阻碍的内容以及快速获胜的内容。 由 LiteLLM 提供支持，可与任何提供商（Anthropic、OpenAI、Bedrock、Gemini、Azure、Ollama）合作。

请参阅 Insights LLM 设置进行配置。

技术堆栈

Layer 技术
前端 Vite 6、React 19、TanStack 路由器、Tailwind CSS 4、shadcn/ui
后端 Python 3.11+、Fas​​tAPI、草莓 GraphQL
数据库 PostgreSQL 16（注册表）、ClickHouse（遥测）
Queue 返回 + 参数
CLI Python，类型，丰富
遥测 会话挂钩、本地转录协调、基于推送的摄取
部署 Docker Compose（10 个服务）、Kubernetes（Helm）

贡献

请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。 简短版本：

  1. 分叉和克隆
  2. make hooks 来安装预提交钩子
  3. 创建功能分支
  4. 运行 make lint 并进行测试
  5. 开设公关

有关内部代码库上下文，请参阅 AGENTS.md。

社区

GitHub 讨论问题和想法。 聊天不和谐。 已确认错误的开放问题。

报告问题

observal support bundle

生成经过编辑的诊断档案。 分享前回顾：观察支持检查观察观察-支持-*.tar.gz

对于实时调试，Observal 使用基于 loguru 的开发日志记录（内部称为“optic”）。 使用以下方式流式传输日志：

observal logs

日志写入 ~/.observal/logs/dev.log 并包含每个请求、后台作业和遥测事件的结构化上下文。

安全

通过 GitHub 私有漏洞报告或发送电子邮件 contact@observal.io 报告漏洞。 不要打开公共问题。 请参阅 SECURITY.md。
